title: Eugene Nalimov
text: Home * People * Eugene Nalimov Eugene Nalimov [1] Eugene V. Nalimov , a Russian computer scientist and chess programmer, M.Sc. from Novosibirsk State University . Eugene actually lives and works in the United States as Microsoft employee as member of the team in developing the Visual C++ compiler. Eugene is author of the chess program Siberian Chess and eponym of the Nalimov endgame tablebases . Besides that, Eugene also contributes as an author of several BitScan routines [2] and of course as optimization expert for the Microsoft Visual C compiler [3] .
